title: The hardest part of training nervous system
description: Short-form X tweet on why the first 90 seconds of any practice are the most leveraged for nervous system regulation.
hook: The first 90 seconds of any practice matter more than the next 30 minutes.

cta.text: Follow for daily applied nervous-system reps.

keyMessage: The opening 90 seconds are where regulation actually happens.

strategy.keyMessage: The opening 90 seconds are where regulation actually happens.
strategy.ctaText: Follow for daily applied nervous-system reps.

creativePlan.hook: The first 90 seconds of any practice matter more than the next 30 minutes.

text.caption:
The first 90 seconds of any practice matter more than the next 30 minutes.

That's when you signal to your nervous system: this is a place to settle.

Blow that window and the rest of the session is rehearsal of vigilance.
